title: Define portable pack capsule and validation contract
summary: Tightens the portability rules for manifests, owned roots, packaging assumptions, and validator behavior.
scope_items: Define the portable pack capsule and expected validator behavior.
Document what copy-out may change and what must remain invariant across packs.
done_when_items: Pack manifests, owned roots, and portability failure modes have an explicit contract.
Reusable-core validation fails deterministically on portability drift.
